title: fix: update cloudflare vite plugin to fix dev server hang
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Un-hanging the dev server
gist.blurb: Squashed a pesky bug where the local dev server would hang indefinitely. A quick bump to our Cloudflare and Vite plugins got the gears turning smoothly again.
gist.summary: Updated Cloudflare Vite plugin, Wrangler, and Vite dependencies to resolve an issue causing the local development server to hang indefinitely.
gist.impact: Developers can now run the local dev environment without encountering silent failures during startup.
gist.visual_concept: The PR fixes a frozen/hanging local development server. Visually represented by Polly the bee fixing a 'frozen' retro computer or server rack, getting the gears turning again.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, using a wrench to unfreeze a retro computer monitor that is glowing lime green (#ecf874). The chunky pixel monitor robot looks relieved. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
